prestazioni: AMG M276 DE30 AL 3.0L V6 Biturbo (engine code) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 2+ ECU flash (400+ HP, 450+ lb-ft) paired with a custom Weistec downpipe featuring 3.5" diameter catted piping and a secondary O2 sensor delete for optimized spool on the stock IHI turbochargers (TD04-14T)

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and preload) and 20mm front/15mm rear lowering capability, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars to eliminate body roll during high-speed cornering on the C43 Estate's 5-link rear suspension

Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (345mm rotors) big brake kit with two-piece floating rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, complemented by Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines for pedal firmness under repeated 0.9g deceleration from 120mph
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the C43 Estate (S205 chassis), featuring carbon fiber front fenders with integrated canards, rear overfenders with a 50mm wider track, and a ducktail spoiler with a 30mm Gurney flap for -15kg of rear lift at 150mph

Vorsteiner V-FF107 20" forged wheels in a staggered 9x20 ET25 front and 10.5x20 ET30 rear setup, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30/20 front, 285/25/20 rear) with a custom offset to fill the Rocket Bunny arches without rubbing

AMG GT-style front grille with a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber insert featuring a blacked-out Mercedes-Benz star and active grille shutters deleted for improved airflow to the Weistec intercooler upgrade, paired with a custom LED DRL strip integrated into the lower bumper lip
